title: Eigenoops
relevance_summary: Phishing attack on Eigenlayer's email verification process resulting in loss of 1.67 million EIGEN tokens.

prevention.rule: Block any tx that sends tokens from a multisig wallet without prior email verification.

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that sends tokens from a multisig wallet without prior email verification.
summary: Eigenlayer lost 1.67 million EIGEN tokens due to a phishing attack exploiting their email-based token distribution process. A guard could have prevented this by blocking token transfers from multisig wallets without prior email verification.
